summary: Created a basic static calculator webpage with responsive styling, clickable keypad controls, keyboard support, shared calculator logic, and Node-based build/test scripts. Verified the calculator logic and UI wiring with automated tests.
testingInstructions: Run `npm run build` to verify the required static assets exist. Run `npm test` to execute the calculator logic and UI interaction tests. To view the page locally outside this sandbox, run `npm start` and open `http://localhost:4173`.
commitMessage: Add basic calculator webpage with tests
